market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is cautious with rising mentions of VIX spike and recent index pullbacks; pre-market futures point to a flat open amid tech volatility. No major macro events but options flow shows heavy put activity on NVDA. BTC and ETH continue their 5-day decline with limited recovery chatter.

predictions.reasoning: Recent 5-day dip of 2% and VIX at 18.11 suggest oversold bounce; X chatter on short covering supports modest upside into close.
Heavy put options flow noted on X and elevated short interest signal continued selling pressure after 5-day weakness.
Crypto follows equity risk-off tone with 4.6% 5-day drop; X sentiment lacks bullish catalysts for rebound today.
EV sector chatter on X shows mild optimism despite broader market dip; potential short squeeze into close.
